allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const db = require\('./db'\); db.getCentralClient\(\).then\(c => c.query\('SELECT id, name, phone_number_id FROM public.clients LIMIT 5'\).then\(r => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows\)\); c.release\(\); process.exit\(0\); }\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
